hero.tagline: Flowers that become part of your memories.
hero.subtagline: A floral studio for weddings, corporate events, and spatial styling.

home.cta_title: Planning a wedding, event, or floral project?

wedding.title: Wedding Flowers
wedding.description: From bouquets to full venue florals — we tell your story through flowers.

event.title: Corporate & Events
event.description: Floral styling for brand pop-ups, corporate events, and launch parties.

styling.title: Spatial Styling
styling.description: Branding cafes, showrooms, and commercial spaces with flowers and botanicals.

class.title: Floral Classes
class.description: From one-day workshops to regular programs — a gift of time spent with flowers.

about.title: About
about.studio_description: Piou Fleur is a floral studio dedicated to creating moments where flowers become part of your memories. Through weddings, corporate events, spatial styling, and classes, we bring the beauty of flowers into your everyday life.
about.philosophy_description: We prioritize emotion over extravagance, and your story over trends. Every work is completed in a unique floral language that suits the client's space and moment.

footer.tagline: Flowers that become part of your memories.
